headline: 3 High-Yielding Dividend Stocks Trading at Dirt Cheap Valuations
summary: These stocks are facing adversity, but with high yields and cheap valuations, investors may be compelled to take a chance on them.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Underweight on General Mills, Lowers Price Target to $30
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Chris Carey   maintains General Mills (NYSE:GIS) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $33 to $30.
